Safeguarding All That Matters to You

Ensuring tranquility by precisely assessing all that holds significance to you.

Begin a Conversation

Our Expertise

Delivering tailored protection and risk management solutions across three core disciplines.

Security Services

Comprehensive close protection and surveillance delivered by experienced professionals with military and law enforcement backgrounds.

Learn More

Diplomatic & Government

Specialist protection for ambassadors, diplomats, and government officials with an understanding of protocol and threat environments.

Learn More

Risk Consultancy

Corporate risk assessment, threat analysis, and travel risk management for organisations operating in complex environments.

Learn More
SIA Licensed
Military Heritage
Global Operations
Government Cleared
24/7 Response

Established Authority in Risk Management

Founded in 2011 by distinguished former members of the UK Armed Forces, Sangnoir Risk Management delivers bespoke protection and risk management solutions to an international clientele.

Our global network of former security professionals provides the depth of expertise and operational capability that our clients require. We are trusted by governments, royalty, and business leaders worldwide.

Discover Our Heritage

0 Countries
24/7 Operational Readiness
Military Heritage

Trusted by Principals Worldwide

The level of discretion and professionalism demonstrated throughout our engagement was exceptional. We could not have asked for a more capable team.

Principal, Private Family Office

Sangnoir understood the complexities of our operational environment from day one. Their advance work and threat assessment were outstanding.

Head of Security, Diplomatic Mission

When a situation escalated beyond our internal capability, Sangnoir deployed within hours. Their crisis response gave our board complete confidence.

General Counsel, International Corporation

Require Our Services

We welcome confidential enquiries from individuals, organisations, and government bodies.
